terms.definition: A tenant-scoped safety briefing record with lifecycle, signing, invite, PDF, and audit behavior.
An employee-facing document record that can participate in document, signing, and evidence workflows.
A company-scoped order assigning one responsibility type to one or more employee appointments in a defined scope.
Evidence and retention metadata attached to finalized document/signature workflows.
Repo-local transport service that talks to the external NCALayer desktop runtime on a signer machine.
Generated compliance document bundle using tracked templates under docs/experimental.
